## Summary

<!-- What changes, and which concrete problem does it solve? -->

## Design fit

<!-- Link the issue, roadmap item, specification, or ADR. Explain any public contract impact. -->

## Verification

<!-- List the exact commands run and their results. Add a focused regression test for behavior changes. -->

## Evidence and data

<!-- For benchmark changes, name inputs, controls, metrics, and raw outputs. Confirm that no private handwriting or credentials are included. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one problem.
- [ ] Tests pass locally; native tests were run if native code changed.
- [ ] Public behavior or protocol changes include matching documentation/spec updates.
- [ ] New bounds or validation rules include an adversarial test.
- [ ] No private ink, credentials, generated build artifacts, or personal capture bundles are included.
- [ ] Security-sensitive details were reported privately instead of described here.
